raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to address the ongoing issue regarding my hotel reservation at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX, originally booked through the American Express XXXX XXXX from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX for {$4200.00}. 

To summarize the situation : XXXX. Initial Booking : On XX/XX/XXXX, I booked the hotel stay at the price of {$4200.00} through the American Express XXXX XXXX, which was accompanied by the Lowest Price Guaranteed offer. 

XXXX. Price Discrepancy : On XX/XX/XXXX, I found a cheaper price of around {$4100.00} by booking directly through the hotel, which also included additional benefits such as a {$750.00} hotel credit and complimentary shuttle service. I also checked other platforms, such as XXXX and XXXX XXXX, and found lower prices there as well. 

XXXX. Request for Price Match : I contacted American Express customer service, requesting a price match based on the Lowest Price Guaranteed terms. Unfortunately, they refused, citing that the hotels promotion was not considered a valid price match. 

XXXX. Dispute Initiation : I was told the booking was nonrefundable, but American Express suggested they could request an exception from the hotel. After attempting to reach the hotel without success, they advised me to dispute the charge through my credit card. Although I did not initially agree to this course of action, they informed me the dispute had already been initiated. 

XXXX. Refund Notification : On XX/XX/XXXX, I received an email from the American Express Dispute team stating they had refunded the charge. When I contacted American Express customer service to clarify, I was assured that the dispute was resolved in my favor, and I was refunded. 

XXXX. Booking XXXX XXXX : Based on this assurance, I booked a new hotel through a different agency, confident that the matter had been settled. 

XXXX. Subsequent Issue : However, I later received an email from the American Express Dispute team informing me that my original booking at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX had been canceled, but that I was still liable for the charge due to the nonrefundable terms. 

Miscommunication and Concerns : The series of misleading information and actions from American Express customer service has created confusion and significant inconvenience. I was led to believe that the charge had been resolved in my favor and that I could proceed with booking a new hotel, only to later find out that I am still being charged for the canceled booking.
